scope: Asset Version Removal Feature (Simplified Single-Feature Build)

summary.description: Complete analysis of unused functions, files, and dependencies for cleanup
summary.note: This analysis identifies what can be safely removed from the plugin to keep only the asset version removal feature

section_1.title: UNUSED FUNCTIONS IN wpshadow.php
section_1.description: Functions defined but NOT used as WordPress hooks, NOT called internally, and NOT exported

functions.name: wpshadow_register_core_features
functions.reason: Never called - feature initialization done inline in wpshadow_init()
functions.usage: No add_action, add_filter, or internal calls found

functions.name: wpshadow_filter_parent_file
functions.reason: Registered as filter but deprecated - tab routing removed
functions.usage: add_filter( 'parent_file', ... ) at line 359 - related to old menu system
functions.note: Can remove corresponding add_filter call at line 359

functions.name: wpshadow_filter_submenu_file
functions.reason: Registered as filter but deprecated - tab routing removed
functions.usage: add_filter( 'submenu_file', ... ) at line 360 - related to old menu system
functions.note: Can remove corresponding add_filter call at line 360

functions.name: wpshadow_render_settings
functions.reason: Complex settings page not used in asset version removal feature
functions.usage: Called in wpshadow_render_core_content() line 625 for 'dashboard_settings' tab
functions.note: Tab routing related - keep if keeping settings UI

functions.name: wpshadow_render_capabilities_page
functions.reason: Capabilities management unrelated to asset version removal
functions.usage: Not called anywhere in current codebase

functions.name: wpshadow_handle_capabilities_post
functions.reason: Handles capability form posts - unused feature
functions.usage: Not called anywhere in current codebase

functions.name: wpshadow_render_tab_router
functions.reason: Complex router for multi-tab interface - can simplify
functions.usage: Callback for add_menu_page and add_submenu_page at lines 414, 418, 429, 433
functions.note: KEEP - Required for admin UI routing. Would need complete UI refactor to remove

functions.name: wpshadow_render_hub_content
functions.reason: Hub management unrelated to asset version removal

functions.name: wpshadow_render_spoke_content
functions.reason: Spoke management unrelated to asset version removal

functions.name: wpshadow_render_performance_dashboard
functions.reason: Performance dashboard not used in asset version removal feature
functions.usage: Never called in current simplified codebase

functions.name: wpshadow_render_modules
functions.reason: Module management disabled in simplified build
functions.usage: Called in wpshadow_render_core_content() line 619 for 'modules' tab
functions.note: Tab-related, can be removed if removing modules UI

section_2.title: UNUSED FILES TO MOVE TO _BACKUP
section_2.description: Files not loaded in wpshadow_init() or required by active code paths

admin_files.description: Admin dashboard and tab management not used in simplified build
admin_files.note: These are loaded implicitly or referenced but not required in wpshadow_init()

core_files.description: Core infrastructure for full plugin not used in asset removal
core_files.note: EXCEPTION: class-wps-notice-manager.php is REQUIRED - used in wpshadow_init()

support_infrastructure.description: Support, monitoring, auditing, and utility files

section_3.title: MINIMUM FILES REQUIRED FOR ASSET VERSION REMOVAL FEATURE
section_3.description: Complete list of files absolutely needed for the feature to work

required_files.required_because: Plugin bootstrap, initialization, menu registration, hooks
Defines WPSHADOW_Feature interface that all features extend
WPSHADOW_Abstract_Feature base class for asset-version-removal feature
WPSHADOW_Asset_Version_Helpers - utility functions for version removal
WPSHADOW_Notice_Manager - initialized in wpshadow_init() for persistent notices

required_files.note: Can be simplified or removed if removing features page UI

required_files.required_because: WPSHADOW_Dashboard_Assets - handles CSS/JS for feature toggles on features page
required_files.note: Only needed if keeping features management page

required_files.required_because: Enqueues admin CSS/JS for dashboard and UI
required_files.note: Can be simplified - contains unused code for module management

comments_to_remove.reason: Keep - useful for understanding feature scoring logic

section_5.title: SIMPLIFICATION RECOMMENDATIONS
section_5.description: How to further simplify the plugin while maintaining functionality

recommendations.description: Delete wpshadow_render_settings, wpshadow_render_capabilities_page, wpshadow_handle_capabilities_post, wpshadow_render_hub_content, wpshadow_render_spoke_content, wpshadow_render_performance_dashboard, wpshadow_render_modules
Remove wpshadow_network_admin_menu and consolidate with wpshadow_admin_menu
recommendations.impact: Reduces duplication, network admin support not needed for single feature

recommendations.description: Simplify wpshadow_render_tab_router to direct only to features page
Delete or simplify wpshadow_render_feature_group_metabox and related metabox registration
recommendations.impact: Simpler features display if not using drag-drop

recommendations.description: Simplify dashboard to not use WordPress postbox system (drag-drop functionality)
Remove unused AJAX handlers for postbox state, metabox saving, etc.

section_6.title: DEPENDENCY MAP
section_6.description: How files depend on each other

section_7.title: FUNCTION USAGE ANALYSIS
section_7.description: Which wpshadow_* functions are actually called

used_functions.name: wpshadow_network_admin_menu
used_functions.usage: Network menu registration - Can be REMOVED

used_functions.name: wpshadow_render_core_content
used_functions.usage: Tab content routing - KEEP but simplify

phase_3_clean_comments: Remove NOTE comments about removed features
Keep explanatory comments for complex logic
phase_4_simplify_ui: Simplify wpshadow_render_core_content to single features tab
Remove postbox/metabox drag-drop if not needed
